scores.correctness_notes: The agent correctly identifies IngressPerAppRequirer as the key class and the requires pattern, but uses v2 library when gold standard says v1 is recommended. The gold standard focuses on the data schema (app databag: name/model/port; unit databag: host), which the agent omits entirely in favour of Python API details.
scores.hallucination_notes: The gold standard explicitly notes the charmlibs docs cover interface specs/data schemas, not the Python library API, and the Python API is only documented in the traefik-k8s-operator repo. The agent provides unverified parameters (strip_prefix, redirect_https, scheme, redirect_https=False), event types (IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent), and methods (is_ready(), url property) that cannot be confirmed against the gold standard source. These may be real but are unverified from the documented source, making them potential hallucinations.
